mechanism_explained: phone ban as right policy with insufficient infrastructure for the educational-exemption call
category collapse — averaging trained-teacher and untrained-teacher deployments produces a number that hides the variable

surgical training as the worked-out infrastructure for what teacher AI training should be (the appendectomy-meta argument)
